race.comment: WIN THE DAY (11) went back from the outside gate and motored late with an excellent second over 1205m at the Sapphire Coast. Among the leading chances with the claim from the good draw. Leading contender. BUTTERFLY STYLE (3) came out positive from the wide gate and had little to offer in the straight when seventh over 1600m at Newcastle. Back in trip today and expect to see her get back and be ridden for luck. Place chance. TOMMY FLYER (6) genuine galloper who is second up today after finishing fourth over 1205m at Sapphire Coast when resuming two weeks ago. Can contest. ZIELLE (12) failed to feature last time out over 1200m at Wyong when fifth. Enjoys this circuit where she has two wins and two placings from five starts. In the mix.
